allow: Bash(python -c "import nbformat; from nbconvert.preprocessors import ExecutePreprocessor; nb = nbformat.read\('Pokemons_Analysis.ipynb', as_version=4\); ep = ExecutePreprocessor\(timeout=120, kernel_name='python3'\); ep.preprocess\(nb, {'metadata': {'path': '.'}}\); nbformat.write\(nb, 'Pokemons_Analysis.ipynb'\); print\('OK'\)")
